special.subtitle: Sunday Special
special.title: Dimanche Taro
special.heading: Traditional Taro Experience
special.paragraph: Our signature dish {{dish}} combines traditional Cameroonian flavors with modern presentation. Tender taro roots, refined with exquisite spices and served with seasonal sides – a culinary experience that transports you straight to Central Africa.
points: Freshly prepared with imported taro roots

items.title: Premium Drinks
items.desc: Fine cocktails & exclusive spirits from around the world.

items.title: Unique Ambiance
items.desc: Luxurious lounge atmosphere with Afro-European flair.

items.title: Finest Sounds
items.desc: Live DJ sets & relaxed tunes every weekend.

items.title: Exclusive Events
items.desc: Private dining, VIP evenings & cultural highlights.
Traditional taro dish with peanut sauce, served with plantains and seasonal vegetables.
Cameroonian chicken dish with plantains, vegetables and a spicy tomato cream.
Bitter leaf stew with shrimp, peanuts and palm oil – a culinary highlight.
Grilled pike-perch with spicy marinade, served with cassava and green beans.
House creation of mango-passion fruit, vodka, lime & a hint of mint.
Hibiscus ginger tea with honey and fresh mint – refreshing & authentic.
Fine wines from South Africa, France and Germany – we're happy to recommend.
Non-alcoholic bliss made from passion fruit, coconut milk and lime.
Three homemade dips: peanut, avocado, tomato-chili – with cassava chips.
Skewers of beef, chicken and shrimp with yakitori glaze and vegetables.
Senegalese coffee with cloves and black pepper – an energizing treat.
Large tasting platter for two with various Cameroonian specialties.

items.subtitle: Sunday Special
items.desc: Our signature event: Enjoy traditional Cameroonian dishes in a relaxed lounge atmosphere. Live cooking stations and authentic music accompany your Sunday.

items.subtitle: Weekend Event
items.desc: Experience live performances by local and international artists. From Afrobeat to jazz to modern lounge sounds – there's something for every mood.

items.subtitle: Exclusive & Private
items.desc: Whether birthdays, corporate events or special occasions – we design your evening exclusively according to your wishes. Our team takes care of every detail.

items.subtitle: Monthly Special
items.desc: Let yourself be guided through the flavors of Central Africa with a multi-course surprise menu. Each month reveals a new culinary story.

contact.title: Write to Us
contact.script: We look forward to hearing from you

contact.quote: We welcome you – comme à la maison.

essential.heading: Essential
essential.body: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.body: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website so we can improve it.

preferences.heading: Preferences
preferences.body: Allow the website to remember your language and region preferences.

manage.heading: Cookie Management
manage.body: You can change or withdraw your consent at any time. Settings are stored in your browser.

footer.tagline: Exclusive Cameroonian premium cuisine meets exquisite lounge atmosphere. Live the exceptional.
